name: feature
description: Scout, plan, implement, then review a feature or non-trivial bug fix

chain.label: Map code
chain.task:
Map the relevant code for this request and identify key files, constraints, existing patterns, and likely validation commands. Do not modify files.

Request: {task}

chain.label: Create plan
Implement

parallel.label: Correctness
parallel.task:
Review the resulting diff for correctness, regressions, and edge cases. Do not modify project/source files. Start from this implementation handoff:

{outputs.implementation}

parallel.label: Tests
parallel.task:
Review the resulting diff for missing or weak tests and validation gaps. Do not modify project/source files. Start from this implementation handoff:

{outputs.implementation}

parallel.label: Cleanup
parallel.task:
Review the resulting diff for simplicity, duplication, verbosity, and AI-slop. Do not modify project/source files. Start from this implementation handoff:

{outputs.implementation}
